description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script on every job to update apt, install libcunit1, libcunit1-doc, libcunit1-dev and libcairo2-dev, clone the Bats testing framework from GitHub into /tmp/bats, install it to /tmp/local and add its bin directory to PATH. Define two stages named build and test. Add a build job in the build stage that executes the command make. Add a test job in the test stage that executes the command make test. The pipeline uses the default image and has no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
